title: Knowledge Base Edge
description: A relationship between two concept nodes. Battle-tested.

type.description: prerequisite = A must be learned before B; part_of = A is a sub-concept of B; related = same theme, no order; teaches = lesson teaches concept; assesses = exercise tests concept

strength.description: Optional. 1.0 = strong, 0.5 = weak. Use for ranking multiple prereqs.

note.description: Optional short note on why this edge exists.
